title: Pulse Notification

statement.markdown:
markdown: ## Pulse Notification
Display a notification with a pulsing effect when a new message is received. When the user hovers over the notification, it should change color and grow in size. When the user clicks the notification, it should disappear. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
requirements
1. Create a notification element with a pulsing effect.
2. Change the color and size of the notification when the user hovers over it.
3. Disappear the notification when the user clicks it.

constraints: No use of external libraries or frameworks.
Use only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Notification pulsing effect should be created using CSS keyframe animations.

gradingCriteria.description: The notification element displays a pulsing effect when displayed.
The notification color and size change when the user hovers over it.
The notification disappears after 5 seconds when displayed.
The notification disappears when the user clicks the show notification button.
